message:
🐛 fix: cncf-generated audit — delete empty resolutions, redact leaked data, fix WIP status (#1454)

Delete 6 empty/useless resolution files (CLA boilerplate, unfilled PR templates).
Redact leaked data: real Linode IPs (metallb), AWS hostnames (linkerd),
unofficial third-party images and private IPs (kube-vip), default
credentials admin:Harbor12345 (3 harbor files).
Mark 7 WIP resolutions as in-progress with warning prefix.
Add force-delete warning to helm workaround script.
Update index.json: remove deleted entries, update count 1074→1068.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
